response:
```sql
SELECT c.conductor_name
FROM conductors c
JOIN conducts cd ON c.conductor_id = cd.conductor_id
JOIN orchestras o ON cd.orchestra_id = o.orchestra_id
GROUP BY c.conductor_id, c.conductor_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.orchestra_id) = (
    SELECT MAX(cnt)
    FROM (
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o2.orchestra_id) AS cnt
        FROM conductors c2
        JOIN conducts cd2 ON c2.conductor_id = cd2.conductor_id
        JOIN orchestras o2 ON cd2.orchestra_id = o2.orchestra_id
        GROUP BY c2.conductor_id
    ) subq
);
```
